targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time,
  activity_type AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Active Users"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top Searches
panels.description: Most popular search queries in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  search_query AS "Search Query",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Unique Users"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
  AND search_query IS NOT NULL
  AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY search_query
ORDER BY "Count" DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT
  COALESCE(a.anime_name, m.romaji_name, m.english_name, 'Unknown') AS "Media",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total Activity",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS "Plays",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT') AS "Exports",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'SEARCH') AS "Searches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS "Unique Users"
FROM "UserActivity" a
LEFT JOIN "Media" m ON m.id = a.media_id
WHERE a.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND a.media_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY "Total Activity" DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH') AS "Searches",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SEGMENT_PLAY') AS "Segment Plays",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'ANKI_EXPORT') AS "Anki Exports",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE activity_type = 'SHARE') AS "Shares",
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Unique Users"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: Top Database Queries
panels.description: Most expensive queries from pg_stat_statements (cumulative since last reset)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  LEFT(query, 120) AS "Query",
  calls AS "Calls",
  ROUND(total_exec_time::numeric / 1000, 2) AS "Total Time (s)",
  ROUND(mean_exec_time::numeric, 2) AS "Mean (ms)",
  ROUND(max_exec_time::numeric, 2) AS "Max (ms)",
  rows AS "Rows",
  CASE WHEN shared_blks_hit + shared_blks_read > 0
    THEN ROUND(100.0 * shared_blks_hit / (shared_blks_hit + shared_blks_read), 1)
    ELSE 100
  END AS "Cache Hit %"
FROM pg_stat_statements
WHERE dbid = (SELECT oid FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'nadeshiko-prod')
  AND query NOT LIKE '%pg_stat_statements%'
  AND query NOT LIKE '%otel-collector-ignore%'
ORDER BY total_exec_time DESC
LIMIT 25

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Searches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "Unique Searchers"
FROM "UserActivity"
WHERE activity_type = 'SEARCH'
  AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
